Trabajamos con las mejores marcas del mercado — <strong style="color:var(--gold)">Knauf, Saint-Gobain y Pladur®</strong> — garantizando el cumplimiento de normativas de habitabilidad, aislamiento acústico y eficiencia energética vigentes.

        <p class="service-desc">Dividimos y redistribuimos espacios de manera rápida, limpia y eficiente. Los tabiques de pladur son hasta 5 veces más ligeros que el ladrillo y permiten un acabado perfecto en la mitad del tiempo.</p>
        <div class="service-tags">
          <span class="tag">Rápido</span>
          <span class="tag">Limpio</span>
          <span class="tag">Económico</span>
        </div>

      <div class="service-card">
        <div class="service-num">03</div>
        <div class="service-icon">🔲</div>
        <h3 class="service-title">Trasdosados</h3>
        <p class="service-desc">Mejora el aislamiento térmico y acústico de paredes existentes sin obras invasivas. Los trasdosados de pladur son la solución ideal para reformas sin demolición, reduciendo ruido y mejorando la eficiencia energética.</p>
        <div class="service-tags">
          <span class="tag">Térmico</span>
          <span class="tag">Acústico</span>
          <span class="tag">Sin obra</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="service-card">
        <div class="service-num">04</div>
        <div class="service-icon">🪑</div>
        <h3 class="service-title">Muebles de Pladur a Medida</h3>
        <p class="service-desc">Creamos elementos decorativos y funcionales únicos: cabeceros de cama, marcos TV, estanterías empotradas, nichos, arcos y cualquier elemento de diseño que imagines. Acabados perfectos integrados en la arquitectura.</p>
        <div class="service-tags">
          <span class="tag">Diseño único</span>
          <span class="tag">100% personalizado</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="service-card">
        <div class="service-num">05</div>
        <div class="service-icon">🔇</div>
        <h3 class="service-title">Insonorización</h3>
        <p class="service-desc">Soluciones profesionales de aislamiento acústico para viviendas, estudios de grabación, locales de ocio y oficinas. Utilizamos sistemas multicapa con lanas minerales y materiales fonoabsorbentes de primera calidad.</p>
        <div class="service-tags">
          <span class="tag">Estudio</span>
          <span class="tag">Hogar</span>
          <span class="tag">Local</span>
        </div>

        <div class="service-icon">🔨</div>

        <p class="service-desc">Coordinamos reformas integrales de viviendas y locales con pladur como base constructiva. Pisos completos, baños, salones y cocinas renovados con criterio estético, funcional y dentro del presupuesto pactado.</p>
        <div class="service-tags">
          <span class="tag">Integral</span>

<script>
  // SCROLL ANIMATIONS
  const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
    entries.forEach((e) => {
      if (e.isIntersecting) {
        e.target.classList.add('visible');
        observer.unobserve(e.target);
      }
    });
  }, { threshold: 0.1 });

  document.querySelectorAll('.fade-up').forEach((el) => observer.observe(el));

  // NAV scroll effect
  window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
    const nav = document.querySelector('nav');
    if (window.scrollY > 60) {
      nav.style.boxShadow = '0 4px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.5)';
    } else {
      nav.style.boxShadow = 'none';
    }
  });

  // HAMBURGER MENU
  function toggleMenu() {
    const ham = document.getElementById('hamburger');
    const menu = document.getElementById('mobileMenu');
    const isOpen = menu.classList.contains('open');
    if (isOpen) {
      menu.classList.remove('open');
      ham.classList.remove('open');
      document.body.style.overflow = '';
    } else {
      menu.classList.add('open');
      ham.classList.add('open');
      document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
    }
  }
  // Close on ESC key
  document.addEventListener('keydown', e => {
    if (e.key === 'Escape') {
      const menu = document.getElementById('mobileMenu');
      if (menu.classList.contains('open')) toggleMenu();
    }
  });

  // FORM SUBMIT
  function handleFormSubmit(e) {
    e.preventDefault();
    const btn = e.target.querySelector('.btn-submit');
    btn.textContent = '✅ ¡Solicitud enviada!';
    btn.style.background = '#22c55e';
    btn.style.color = 'white';
    setTimeout(() => {
      btn.textContent = '📋 Enviar solicitud de presupuesto';
      btn.style.background = '';
      btn.style.color = '';
      e.target.reset();
    }, 4000);
  }
</script>










<script>
(function() {
"use strict";

// Helper: switch to canvas render when image fails to load
function useFallback(imgId, loaderId, renderFn) {
  try {
    const canvas = renderFn(800, 500);
    const img = document.getElementById(imgId);
    const loader = document.getElementById(loaderId);
    img.onload = null; img.onerror = null;
    img.src = canvas.toDataURL("image/png");
    img.style.display = "block";
    img.style.animation = "fadeIn 0.7s ease";
    if (loader) loader.style.display = "none";
  } catch(e) {
    const ld = document.getElementById(loaderId);
    if (ld) ld.style.display = "none";
  }
}

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
//  ARTEPLACKO MÁLAGA — Renders internos sin API
//  100% canvas, 0 llamadas externas, 0 errores
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────

function grain(ctx, w, h, alpha) {
  for (let i = 0; i < 3000; i++) {
    ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(255,255,255,${Math.random() * alpha})`;
    ctx.fillRect(Math.random() * w, Math.random() * h, 1, 1);
  }
}
function vignette(ctx, w, h) {
  const v = ctx.createRadialGradient(w/2, h/2, h*0.25, w/2, h/2, h*0.9);
  v.addColorStop(0, "transparent");
  v.addColorStop(1, "rgba(0,0,0,0.62)");
  ctx.fillStyle = v; ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h);
}
function badge(ctx, w, h) {
  ctx.fillStyle = "rgba(0,0,0,0.55)";
  ctx.fillRect(0, h - 26, 210, 26);
  ctx.fillStyle = "rgba(200,169,110,0.95)";
  ctx.font = "bold 10px 'DM Sans', sans-serif";
  ctx.fillText("✦ ARTEPLACKO MÁLAGA · DISEÑO IA", 10, h - 8);
}
function toImg(canvas, imgId, loaderId) {
  const img = document.getElementById(imgId);
  const loader = document.getElementById(loaderId);
  if (!img || !loader) return;
  img.src = canvas.toDataURL("image/png");
  img.style.display = "block";
  img.style.animation = "fadeIn 0.7s ease";
  loader.style.display = "none";
}

// ── ESCENA 1: TECHO LED ──────────────────────
function renderLEDCeiling(W, H) {
  const cv = document.createElement("canvas");
  cv.width = W; cv.height = H;
  const c = cv.getContext("2d");

  // Ceiling surface
  const ceil = c.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, H * 0.52);
  ceil.addColorStop(0, "#ede8e0"); ceil.addColorStop(0.5, "#ddd5c8"); ceil.addColorStop(1, "#c8bfb0");
  c.fillStyle = ceil; c.fillRect(0, 0, W, H * 0.52);

  // Perspective grid on ceiling
  c.strokeStyle = "rgba(160,150,138,0.18)"; c.lineWidth = 0.8;
  const vp = { x: W / 2, y: H * 0.52 };
  for (let i = 0; i <= 10; i++) {
    const x = (W / 10) * i;
    c.beginPath(); c.moveTo(x, 0); c.lineTo(vp.x, vp.y); c.stroke();
  }
  for (let row = 1; row <= 4; row++) {
    const y = (H * 0.52 / 5) * row;
    const spread = (1 - row / 5) * 0.4;
    c.beginPath(); c.moveTo(W * spread, y); c.lineTo(W * (1 - spread), y); c.stroke();
  }

  // LED cove channel (recessed)
  c.fillStyle = "#2e2820";
  c.fillRect(W * 0.06, H * 0.065, W * 0.88, H * 0.03);
  c.fillStyle = "#1a1510";
  c.fillRect(W * 0.07, H * 0.068, W * 0.86, H * 0.022);

  // LED glow — multi-layer soft
  const ledY = H * 0.079;
  for (let r = 14; r > 0; r--) {
    c.strokeStyle = `rgba(255,215,100,${0.028 * r})`;
    c.lineWidth = r * 5;
    c.beginPath(); c.moveTo(W * 0.08, ledY); c.lineTo(W * 0.92, ledY); c.stroke();
  }
  c.strokeStyle = "rgba(255,242,180,1)"; c.lineWidth = 1.8;
  c.beginPath(); c.moveTo(W * 0.08, ledY); c.lineTo(W * 0.92, ledY); c.stroke();

  // Light wash downward
  const wash = c.createLinearGradient(0, ledY, 0, H * 0.52);
  wash.addColorStop(0, "rgba(255,210,90,0.22)");
  wash.addColorStop(0.4, "rgba(255,200,80,0.07)");
  wash.addColorStop(1, "transparent");
  c.fillStyle = wash; c.fillRect(0, 0, W, H * 0.52);

  // Wall left
  const wL = c.createLinearGradient(0, 0, W * 0.14, 0);
  wL.addColorStop(0, "#b8b0a4"); wL.addColorStop(1, "#ddd5c8");
  c.fillStyle = wL; c.fillRect(0, 0, W * 0.1, H * 0.52);

  // Wall right
  const wR = c.createLinearGradient(W * 0.88, 0, W, 0);
  wR.addColorStop(0, "#ddd5c8"); wR.addColorStop(1, "#b0a898");
  c.fillStyle = wR; c.fillRect(W * 0.9, 0, W * 0.1, H * 0.52);

  // Floor — warm oak
  const floor = c.createLinearGradient(0, H * 0.52, W, H);
  floor.addColorStop(0, "#8a7055"); floor.addColorStop(0.25, "#a08462");
  floor.addColorStop(0.6, "#b89470"); floor.addColorStop(1, "#786048");
  c.fillStyle = floor; c.fillRect(0, H * 0.52, W, H * 0.48);

  // Floor plank lines in perspective
  c.save();
  for (let i = 0; i < 14; i++) {
    const x0 = (W / 13) * i;
    const x1 = vp.x + (x0 - vp.x) * 1.8;
    c.strokeStyle = "rgba(60,35,15,0.12)"; c.lineWidth = 1;
    c.beginPath(); c.moveTo(x0, H * 0.52); c.lineTo(x1, H); c.stroke();
  }
  for (let j = 0; j < 5; j++) {
    c.strokeStyle = "rgba(60,35,15,0.06)"; c.lineWidth = 0.5;
    c.beginPath();
    c.moveTo(0, H * (0.6 + j * 0.09));
    c.lineTo(W, H * (0.58 + j * 0.09));
    c.stroke();
  }
  c.restore();

  // Floor reflection of LED
  const refl = c.createLinearGradient(0, H * 0.52, 0, H * 0.68);
  refl.addColorStop(0, "rgba(255,215,100,0.18)");
  refl.addColorStop(1, "transparent");
  c.fillStyle = refl; c.fillRect(0, H * 0.52, W, H * 0.16);

  // Sofa silhouette
  const sofaY = H * 0.62;
  c.fillStyle = "#5a4c3c";
  c.beginPath(); c.roundRect(W*0.18, sofaY, W*0.64, H*0.14, 4); c.fill();
  c.fillStyle = "#6a5a48";
  c.beginPath(); c.roundRect(W*0.18, sofaY - H*0.055, W*0.64, H*0.06, [3,3,0,0]); c.fill();
  c.fillStyle = "#5a4c3c";
  c.fillRect(W*0.18, sofaY - H*0.055, W*0.052, H*0.195);
  c.fillRect(W*0.728, sofaY - H*0.055, W*0.052, H*0.195);
  // Cushions
  for (let p = 0; p < 3; p++) {
    c.fillStyle = p === 1 ? "#7a6a58" : "#887868";
    c.beginPath(); c.roundRect(W*(0.23 + p*0.185), sofaY + H*0.01, W*0.15, H*0.1, 4); c.fill();
    // cushion highlight
    const ph = c.createLinearGradient(0, sofaY, 0, sofaY + H*0.05);
    ph.addColorStop(0, "rgba(255,255,255,0.06)"); ph.addColorStop(1, "transparent");
    c.fillStyle = ph;
    c.beginPath(); c.roundRect(W*(0.23 + p*0.185), sofaY + H*0.01, W*0.15, H*0.05, 4); c.fill();
  }

  grain(c, W, H, 0.016); vignette(c, W, H); badge(c, W, H);
  return cv;
}

// ── ESCENA 2: TABIQUE PLADUR ─────────────────
function renderPartitionWall(W, H) {
  const cv = document.createElement("canvas"); cv.width = W; cv.height = H;
  const c = cv.getContext("2d");

  // Ambient background
  const bg = c.createLinearGradient(0, 0, W, H);
  bg.addColorStop(0, "#c8c0b4"); bg.addColorStop(1, "#a09888");
  c.fillStyle = bg; c.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);

  // Ceiling
  c.fillStyle = "#e8e4dc"; c.fillRect(0, 0, W, H * 0.1);
  c.fillStyle = "rgba(0,0,0,0.06)";
  c.fillRect(0, H * 0.09, W, H * 0.02);

  // Right side existing wall
  c.fillStyle = "#d0c8bc"; c.fillRect(W * 0.55, H * 0.1, W * 0.45, H * 0.62);
  // Wall perspective shadow
  const wsR = c.createLinearGradient(W * 0.55, 0, W * 0.65, 0);
  wsR.addColorStop(0, "rgba(0,0,0,0.12)"); wsR.addColorStop(1, "transparent");
  c.fillStyle = wsR; c.fillRect(W * 0.55, H * 0.1, W * 0.1, H * 0.62);

  // NEW PARTITION WALL — pure fresh white pladur
  const wallGrad = c.createLinearGradient(W * 0.06, 0, W * 0.54, 0);
  wallGrad.addColorStop(0, "#f8f4f0"); wallGrad.addColorStop(0.85, "#ede9e2"); wallGrad.addColorStop(1, "#d8d0c8");
  c.fillStyle = wallGrad; c.fillRect(W * 0.06, H * 0.1, W * 0.49, H * 0.62);

  // Subtle horizontal lines (wall joints)
  c.strokeStyle = "rgba(200,192,182,0.3)"; c.lineWidth = 0.5;
  for (let j = 1; j <= 8; j++) {
    c.beginPath(); c.moveTo(W*0.06, H*(0.1 + j*(0.62/9)));
    c.lineTo(W*0.55, H*(0.1 + j*(0.62/9))); c.stroke();
  }
  // Vertical stud lines
  for (let s = 1; s <= 4; s++) {
    c.strokeStyle = "rgba(200,192,182,0.18)"; c.lineWidth = 0.8;
    c.beginPath(); c.moveTo(W*(0.06 + s*0.098), H*0.1);
    c.lineTo(W*(0.06 + s*0.098), H*0.72); c.stroke();
  }

  // Wall edge shadow (thickness)
  c.fillStyle = "#b0a898"; c.fillRect(W*0.055, H*0.1, W*0.012, H*0.62);
  c.fillStyle = "#c0b8b0"; c.fillRect(W*0.054, H*0.098, W*0.496, H*0.014);

  // Door opening
  c.fillStyle = "#1c1610"; c.fillRect(W*0.22, H*0.28, W*0.18, H*0.44);
  // Door frame
  c.strokeStyle = "#d0c8b8"; c.lineWidth = 4;
  c.strokeRect(W*0.215, H*0.275, W*0.19, H*0.45);
  // Door (slightly ajar)
  const door = c.createLinearGradient(W*0.22, 0, W*0.4, 0);
  door.addColorStop(0, "#e8e4dc"); door.addColorStop(0.6, "#d8d0c8"); door.addColorStop(1, "#c0b8b0");
  c.fillStyle = door; c.fillRect(W*0.23, H*0.285, W*0.155, H*0.42);
  // Door panel detail
  c.strokeStyle = "rgba(180,170,158,0.4)"; c.lineWidth = 1;
  c.strokeRect(W*0.245, H*0.32, W*0.12, H*0.16);
  c.strokeRect(W*0.245, H*0.51, W*0.12, H*0.16);
  // Handle
  c.fillStyle = "#c8a96e";
  c.beginPath(); c.roundRect(W*0.364, H*0.455, W*0.022, H*0.06, 3); c.fill();
  c.beginPath(); c.arc(W*0.375, H*0.455, W*0.008, 0, Math.PI * 2); c.fill();

  // Floor
  const fl = c.createLinearGradient(0, H*0.72, W, H);
  fl.addColorStop(0, "#9a8468"); fl.addColorStop(0.4, "#b09478");
  fl.addColorStop(0.75, "#c0a484"); fl.addColorStop(1, "#887058");
  c.fillStyle = fl; c.fillRect(0, H*0.72, W, H*0.28);

  // Floor tiles grid
  c.strokeStyle = "rgba(80,60,40,0.07)"; c.lineWidth = 0.6;
  for (let ti = 0; ti < 10; ti++) {
    c.beginPath(); c.moveTo(ti*(W/9), H*0.72); c.lineTo(ti*(W/9)+30, H); c.stroke();
    c.beginPath(); c.moveTo(0, H*0.72 + ti*(H*0.28/9));
    c.lineTo(W, H*0.72 + ti*(H*0.28/9)); c.stroke();
  }
  // Skirting
  c.fillStyle = "#e8e2d8"; c.fillRect(0, H*0.72, W, H*0.018);
  c.fillStyle = "rgba(0,0,0,0.08)"; c.fillRect(0, H*0.72, W, H*0.005);

  // Construction laser level line
  c.strokeStyle = "rgba(255,50,50,0.45)"; c.lineWidth = 1;
  c.setLineDash([6, 3]);
  c.beginPath(); c.moveTo(0, H*0.28); c.lineTo(W, H*0.28); c.stroke();
  c.setLineDash([]);

  grain(c, W, H, 0.015); vignette(c, W, H); badge(c, W, H);
  return cv;
}

// ── ESCENA 3: MUEBLE TV EMPOTRADO ────────────
function renderTVUnit(W, H) {
  const cv = document.createElement("canvas"); cv.width = W; cv.height = H;
  const c = cv.getContext("2d");

  // Deep dark room
  const bg = c.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, H);
  bg.addColorStop(0, "#1a1410"); bg.addColorStop(1, "#0e0c08");
  c.fillStyle = bg; c.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);

  // Accent wall (whole back wall)
  c.fillStyle = "#252018"; c.fillRect(0, 0, W, H * 0.82);

  // Wall texture
  for (let i = 0; i < 25; i++) {
    c.strokeStyle = "rgba(255,255,255,0.015)"; c.lineWidth = 0.5;
    c.beginPath(); c.moveTo(0, (H * 0.82 / 24) * i);
    c.lineTo(W, (H * 0.82 / 24) * i); c.stroke();
  }

  // TV unit outer body
  c.fillStyle = "#181410"; c.fillRect(W*0.01, H*0.05, W*0.98, H*0.72);
  // Body inner shadow
  const bodyS = c.createLinearGradient(W*0.01, 0, W*0.06, 0);
  bodyS.addColorStop(0, "rgba(0,0,0,0.4)"); bodyS.addColorStop(1, "transparent");
  c.fillStyle = bodyS; c.fillRect(W*0.01, H*0.05, W*0.05, H*0.72);
  const bodyS2 = c.createLinearGradient(W*0.95, 0, W*0.99, 0);
  bodyS2.addColorStop(0, "transparent"); bodyS2.addColorStop(1, "rgba(0,0,0,0.35)");
  c.fillStyle = bodyS2; c.fillRect(W*0.94, H*0.05, W*0.05, H*0.72);

  // LEFT shelves column
  for (let s = 0; s < 3; s++) {
    const sy = H*(0.08 + s*0.2);
    c.fillStyle = "#1e1812"; c.fillRect(W*0.03, sy, W*0.2, H*0.16);
    // Shelf inner glow
    const sg = c.createLinearGradient(0, sy, 0, sy + H*0.16);
    sg.addColorStop(0, "rgba(200,169,110,0.06)"); sg.addColorStop(1, "transparent");
    c.fillStyle = sg; c.fillRect(W*0.03, sy, W*0.2, H*0.16);
    // Shelf bottom edge
    c.fillStyle = "#2a2218"; c.fillRect(W*0.03, sy + H*0.155, W*0.2, H*0.005);
    // Items
    const itemH = H * (0.06 + Math.random() * 0.07);
    c.fillStyle = `hsl(${30 + s*20},45%,${35 + s*5}%)`; // books
    c.fillRect(W*0.045, sy + H*0.16 - itemH - H*0.005, W*0.025, itemH);
    c.fillStyle = `hsl(${200 + s*15},35%,30%)`;
    c.fillRect(W*0.075, sy + H*0.16 - itemH*0.9 - H*0.005, W*0.02, itemH*0.9);
    // Small decorative sphere
    c.fillStyle = "rgba(200,169,110,0.5)";
    c.beginPath(); c.arc(W*0.14, sy + H*0.12, W*0.018, 0, Math.PI*2); c.fill();
    // Sphere highlight
    c.fillStyle = "rgba(255,240,200,0.3)";
    c.beginPath(); c.arc(W*0.136, sy + H*0.108, W*0.007, 0, Math.PI*2); c.fill();
  }

  // RIGHT shelves column
  for (let s = 0; s < 3; s++) {
    const sy = H*(0.08 + s*0.2);
    c.fillStyle = "#1e1812"; c.fillRect(W*0.77, sy, W*0.2, H*0.16);
    const sg = c.createLinearGradient(0, sy, 0, sy + H*0.16);
    sg.addColorStop(0, "rgba(200,169,110,0.06)"); sg.addColorStop(1, "transparent");
    c.fillStyle = sg; c.fillRect(W*0.77, sy, W*0.2, H*0.16);
    c.fillStyle = "#2a2218"; c.fillRect(W*0.77, sy + H*0.155, W*0.2, H*0.005);
    // Plant
    c.fillStyle = "rgba(60,100,60,0.7)";
    c.beginPath(); c.ellipse(W*0.82, sy + H*0.1, W*0.022, H*0.065, -0.2, 0, Math.PI*2); c.fill();
    c.beginPath(); c.ellipse(W*0.845, sy + H*0.09, W*0.018, H*0.055, 0.3, 0, Math.PI*2); c.fill();
    c.fillStyle = "#2a1c10";
    c.fillRect(W*0.828, sy + H*0.13, W*0.01, H*0.028);
    // Vase
    c.fillStyle = "rgba(180,150,100,0.6)";
    c.beginPath(); c.roundRect(W*0.822, sy + H*0.13, W*0.022, H*0.026, 2); c.fill();
    // Frame on wall
    c.fillStyle = "#2a2018"; c.fillRect(W*0.858, sy + H*0.02, W*0.1, H*0.12);
    c.strokeStyle = "#c8a96e"; c.lineWidth = 1.5;
    c.strokeRect(W*0.858, sy + H*0.02, W*0.1, H*0.12);
    c.fillStyle = `hsl(${210+s*20},30%,20%)`;
    c.fillRect(W*0.862, sy + H*0.025, W*0.092, H*0.11);
  }

  // TV CENTRAL NICHE
  c.fillStyle = "#0c0a08"; c.fillRect(W*0.25, H*0.06, W*0.5, H*0.54);
  // TV bezel
  c.fillStyle = "#181410"; c.fillRect(W*0.255, H*0.065, W*0.49, H*0.52);
  // Screen
  const screen = c.createLinearGradient(W*0.26, H*0.07, W*0.74, H*0.57);
  screen.addColorStop(0, "#0a1020"); screen.addColorStop(0.4, "#122040");
  screen.addColorStop(0.7, "#0e1a35"); screen.addColorStop(1, "#080e18");
  c.fillStyle = screen; c.fillRect(W*0.262, H*0.072, W*0.476, H*0.5);
  // Screen content (abstract image)
  const content1 = c.createRadialGradient(W*0.5, H*0.32, 0, W*0.5, H*0.32, W*0.2);
  content1.addColorStop(0, "rgba(100,150,200,0.3)");
  content1.addColorStop(1, "transparent");
  c.fillStyle = content1; c.fillRect(W*0.262, H*0.072, W*0.476, H*0.5);
  // Screen glare
  const glare = c.createLinearGradient(W*0.262, H*0.072, W*0.38, H*0.2);
  glare.addColorStop(0, "rgba(255,255,255,0.07)"); glare.addColorStop(1, "transparent");
  c.fillStyle = glare; c.fillRect(W*0.262, H*0.072, W*0.2, H*0.18);

  // LED strip UNDER TV unit — the signature glow
  for (let r = 14; r > 0; r--) {
    c.strokeStyle = `rgba(200,169,110,${0.05 * r})`;
    c.lineWidth = r * 3.5;
    c.beginPath(); c.moveTo(W*0.04, H*0.775); c.lineTo(W*0.96, H*0.775); c.stroke();
  }
  c.strokeStyle = "rgba(255,228,140,0.95)"; c.lineWidth = 1.5;
  c.beginPath(); c.moveTo(W*0.04, H*0.775); c.lineTo(W*0.96, H*0.775); c.stroke();

  // LED shelf strips
  for (let s = 0; s < 3; s++) {
    const sy = H*(0.08 + s*0.2);
    c.strokeStyle = "rgba(200,169,110,0.35)"; c.lineWidth = 1;
    c.beginPath(); c.moveTo(W*0.03, sy); c.lineTo(W*0.23, sy); c.stroke();
    c.beginPath(); c.moveTo(W*0.77, sy); c.lineTo(W*0.97, sy); c.stroke();
  }

  // Floor
  const fl = c.createLinearGradient(0, H*0.82, W, H);
  fl.addColorStop(0, "#3c2e1a"); fl.addColorStop(0.5, "#4a3a22"); fl.addColorStop(1, "#302414");
  c.fillStyle = fl; c.fillRect(0, H*0.82, W, H*0.18);

  // LED floor reflection
  const ledRefl = c.createLinearGradient(0, H*0.82, 0, H*0.95);
  ledRefl.addColorStop(0, "rgba(200,169,110,0.2)"); ledRefl.addColorStop(1, "transparent");
  c.fillStyle = ledRefl; c.fillRect(0, H*0.82, W, H*0.13);

  grain(c, W, H, 0.018); vignette(c, W, H); badge(c, W, H);
  return cv;
}

// ── ESCENA 4: ESTUDIO INSONORIZADO ───────────
function renderStudio(W, H) {
  const cv = document.createElement("canvas"); cv.width = W; cv.height = H;
  const c = cv.getContext("2d");

  c.fillStyle = "#080510"; c.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);

  // Acoustic panel grid
  const cols = 10, rows = 7;
  const pw = W/cols, ph = H/rows;
  const panelPalette = ["#100820","#180c28","#0e0618","#140a22","#0a0514","#1c1030"];
  for (let r = 0; r < rows; r++) {
    for (let cc = 0; cc < cols; cc++) {
      c.fillStyle = panelPalette[(r*cols+cc) % panelPalette.length];
      c.fillRect(cc*pw+1, r*ph+1, pw-2, ph-2);
      // Panel inner bevel
      c.strokeStyle = "rgba(120,90,160,0.12)"; c.lineWidth = 0.5;
      c.strokeRect(cc*pw+5, r*ph+5, pw-10, ph-10);
      // Wedge texture lines
      c.strokeStyle = "rgba(80,60,110,0.1)"; c.lineWidth = 0.4;
      for (let wl = 1; wl <= 4; wl++) {
        c.beginPath();
        c.moveTo(cc*pw + pw*wl/5, r*ph);
        c.lineTo(cc*pw + pw*wl/5, r*ph+ph);
        c.stroke();
      }
    }
  }

  // Purple/blue atmosphere
  const atm = c.createRadialGradient(W*0.5, H*0.35, 0, W*0.5, H*0.35, H*0.8);
  atm.addColorStop(0, "rgba(110,70,180,0.22)");
  atm.addColorStop(0.5, "rgba(70,45,140,0.1)");
  atm.addColorStop(1, "transparent");
  c.fillStyle = atm; c.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);

  // Overhead RGB bar
  c.fillStyle = "#0a0818"; c.fillRect(W*0.15, H*0.02, W*0.7, H*0.04);
  for (let r = 8; r > 0; r--) {
    c.strokeStyle = `rgba(160,100,255,${0.06*r})`;
    c.lineWidth = r * 3.5;
    c.beginPath(); c.moveTo(W*0.18, H*0.04); c.lineTo(W*0.82, H*0.04); c.stroke();
  }
  c.strokeStyle = "rgba(180,130,255,0.9)"; c.lineWidth = 1.5;
  c.beginPath(); c.moveTo(W*0.18, H*0.04); c.lineTo(W*0.82, H*0.04); c.stroke();

  // Monitor L
  c.fillStyle = "#140f1c";
  c.beginPath(); c.roundRect(W*0.02, H*0.3, W*0.14, H*0.3, 3); c.fill();
  c.fillStyle = "#0a0812";
  c.beginPath(); c.arc(W*0.09, H*0.44, W*0.045, 0, Math.PI*2); c.fill();
  const wf1 = c.createRadialGradient(W*0.09, H*0.44, 0, W*0.09, H*0.44, W*0.042);
  wf1.addColorStop(0, "#1a1428"); wf1.addColorStop(1, "#080610");
  c.fillStyle = wf1;
  c.beginPath(); c.arc(W*0.09, H*0.44, W*0.042, 0, Math.PI*2); c.fill();
  // Speaker dust cap
  c.fillStyle = "rgba(100,80,140,0.4)";
  c.beginPath(); c.arc(W*0.09, H*0.44, W*0.012, 0, Math.PI*2); c.fill();
  // Tweeter
  c.fillStyle = "#181020";
  c.beginPath(); c.ellipse(W*0.09, H*0.34, W*0.018, H*0.025, 0, 0, Math.PI*2); c.fill();

  // Monitor R
  c.fillStyle = "#140f1c";
  c.beginPath(); c.roundRect(W*0.84, H*0.3, W*0.14, H*0.3, 3); c.fill();
  c.fillStyle = "#0a0812";
  c.beginPath(); c.arc(W*0.91, H*0.44, W*0.045, 0, Math.PI*2); c.fill();
  c.fillStyle = wf1;
  c.beginPath(); c.arc(W*0.91, H*0.44, W*0.042, 0, Math.PI*2); c.fill();
  c.fillStyle = "rgba(100,80,140,0.4)";
  c.beginPath(); c.arc(W*0.91, H*0.44, W*0.012, 0, Math.PI*2); c.fill();
  c.fillStyle = "#181020";
  c.beginPath(); c.ellipse(W*0.91, H*0.34, W*0.018, H*0.025, 0, 0, Math.PI*2); c.fill();

  // Console base
  c.fillStyle = "#0c0a14";
  c.beginPath(); c.roundRect(W*0.1, H*0.65, W*0.8, H*0.3, [4,4,0,0]); c.fill();
  const consGrad = c.createLinearGradient(0, H*0.65, 0, H*0.95);
  consGrad.addColorStop(0, "#141020"); consGrad.addColorStop(1, "#0a0814");
  c.fillStyle = consGrad;
  c.beginPath(); c.roundRect(W*0.11, H*0.66, W*0.78, H*0.27, [3,3,0,0]); c.fill();

  // Fader channels
  const faderColors = ["#8050c8","#5080c8","#50b880","#c8a030","#c84050","#50c8b8"];
  for (let f = 0; f < 18; f++) {
    const fx = W*0.12 + f*(W*0.76/17);
    // Channel strip
    c.fillStyle = "rgba(255,255,255,0.03)"; c.fillRect(fx-1, H*0.67, W*0.036, H*0.22);
    // Fader track
    c.fillStyle = "#201828"; c.fillRect(fx+W*0.008, H*0.685, W*0.014, H*0.14);
    // Fader cap
    const fpos = 0.2 + Math.random() * 0.7;
    c.fillStyle = "#e0d8f0";
    c.beginPath(); c.roundRect(fx+W*0.003, H*(0.685+fpos*0.1), W*0.024, H*0.025, 2); c.fill();
    // LED dot
    c.fillStyle = faderColors[f % faderColors.length];
    c.beginPath(); c.arc(fx+W*0.015, H*0.695, 3, 0, Math.PI*2); c.fill();
    // Glow
    const dg = c.createRadialGradient(fx+W*0.015, H*0.695, 0, fx+W*0.015, H*0.695, 6);
    dg.addColorStop(0, faderColors[f%faderColors.length]+"80"); dg.addColorStop(1, "transparent");
    c.fillStyle = dg; c.beginPath(); c.arc(fx+W*0.015, H*0.695, 6, 0, Math.PI*2); c.fill();
  }

  // VU meters
  for (let m = 0; m < 28; m++) {
    const mx = W*0.13 + m*(W*0.74/27);
    const lvl = 0.3 + Math.random() * 0.7;
    for (let seg = 0; seg < 10; seg++) {
      const lit = seg/10 < lvl;
      const segColor = seg >= 8 ? "#ff3333" : seg >= 6 ? "#ffaa00" : "#33cc66";
      c.fillStyle = lit ? segColor : "#1a1428";
      c.fillRect(mx, H*0.9 - seg*H*0.022, W*0.02, H*0.018);
    }
  }

  grain(c, W, H, 0.014); vignette(c, W, H); badge(c, W, H);
  return cv;
}

// ── ESCENA 5: CABECERO PLADUR ────────────────
function renderHeadboard(W, H) {
  const cv = document.createElement("canvas"); cv.width = W; cv.height = H;
  const c = cv.getContext("2d");

  // Warm dark bedroom
  const bg = c.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, H);
  bg.addColorStop(0, "#18140e"); bg.addColorStop(1, "#100c08");
  c.fillStyle = bg; c.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);

  // Back wall — painted warm white pladur
  c.fillStyle = "#f0ece4"; c.fillRect(W*0.03, H*0.02, W*0.94, H*0.76);

  // Subtle wall texture
  c.strokeStyle = "rgba(200,192,180,0.15)"; c.lineWidth = 0.4;
  for (let wl = 0; wl < 28; wl++) {
    c.beginPath(); c.moveTo(W*0.03, H*(0.02+wl*(0.76/27)));
    c.lineTo(W*0.97, H*(0.02+wl*(0.76/27))); c.stroke();
  }

  // HEADBOARD MAIN PANEL
  const hbG = c.createLinearGradient(W*0.04, 0, W*0.96, 0);
  hbG.addColorStop(0, "#d8d2ca"); hbG.addColorStop(0.15, "#e8e2da");
  hbG.addColorStop(0.85, "#e8e2da"); hbG.addColorStop(1, "#cec8c0");
  c.fillStyle = hbG; c.fillRect(W*0.04, H*0.03, W*0.92, H*0.72);

  // Left decorative panel
  const lpG = c.createLinearGradient(W*0.04, 0, W*0.24, 0);
  lpG.addColorStop(0, "#d0c8c0"); lpG.addColorStop(1, "#dedad2");
  c.fillStyle = lpG; c.fillRect(W*0.04, H*0.03, W*0.2, H*0.72);
  // Panel grooves left
  c.strokeStyle = "rgba(180,172,162,0.35)"; c.lineWidth = 0.7;
  for (let pg = 1; pg <= 4; pg++) {
    c.beginPath(); c.moveTo(W*(0.04+pg*0.04), H*0.05);
    c.lineTo(W*(0.04+pg*0.04), H*0.73); c.stroke();
  }

  // Right decorative panel
  const rpG = c.createLinearGradient(W*0.76, 0, W*0.96, 0);
  rpG.addColorStop(0, "#dedad2"); rpG.addColorStop(1, "#cec8c0");
  c.fillStyle = rpG; c.fillRect(W*0.76, H*0.03, W*0.2, H*0.72);
  for (let pg = 1; pg <= 4; pg++) {
    c.strokeStyle = "rgba(180,172,162,0.35)"; c.lineWidth = 0.7;
    c.beginPath(); c.moveTo(W*(0.76+pg*0.04), H*0.05);
    c.lineTo(W*(0.76+pg*0.04), H*0.73); c.stroke();
  }

  // CENTRAL NICHE — deep recess
  const nicheG = c.createLinearGradient(W*0.27, 0, W*0.73, 0);
  nicheG.addColorStop(0, "#b8b0a8"); nicheG.addColorStop(0.1, "#c8c0b8");
  nicheG.addColorStop(0.9, "#c8c0b8"); nicheG.addColorStop(1, "#b0a8a0");
  c.fillStyle = nicheG; c.fillRect(W*0.27, H*0.06, W*0.46, H*0.46);

  // Niche depth shadows
  const nSL = c.createLinearGradient(W*0.27, 0, W*0.32, 0);
  nSL.addColorStop(0, "rgba(0,0,0,0.2)"); nSL.addColorStop(1, "transparent");
  c.fillStyle = nSL; c.fillRect(W*0.27, H*0.06, W*0.05, H*0.46);
  const nSR = c.createLinearGradient(W*0.68, 0, W*0.73, 0);
  nSR.addColorStop(0, "transparent"); nSR.addColorStop(1, "rgba(0,0,0,0.18)");
  c.fillStyle = nSR; c.fillRect(W*0.68, H*0.06, W*0.05, H*0.46);
  const nSB = c.createLinearGradient(0, H*0.47, 0, H*0.52);
  nSB.addColorStop(0, "transparent"); nSB.addColorStop(1, "rgba(0,0,0,0.15)");
  c.fillStyle = nSB; c.fillRect(W*0.27, H*0.47, W*0.46, H*0.05);

  // Niche shelf divider
  c.fillStyle = "#d8d0c8"; c.fillRect(W*0.27, H*0.3, W*0.46, H*0.012);
  c.fillStyle = "rgba(0,0,0,0.08)"; c.fillRect(W*0.27, H*0.312, W*0.46, H*0.005);

  // Upper niche objects
  // Tall vase
  c.fillStyle = "#8a7458";
  c.beginPath(); c.roundRect(W*0.31, H*0.09, W*0.035, H*0.2, [4,4,2,2]); c.fill();
  c.fillStyle = "rgba(255,240,200,0.2)";
  c.beginPath(); c.roundRect(W*0.312, H*0.09, W*0.012, H*0.06, 2); c.fill();
  // Branch in vase
  c.strokeStyle = "rgba(60,45,30,0.6)"; c.lineWidth = 1.5;
  c.beginPath(); c.moveTo(W*0.328, H*0.09); c.quadraticCurveTo(W*0.32, H*0.06, W*0.31, H*0.04); c.stroke();
  c.beginPath(); c.moveTo(W*0.328, H*0.09); c.quadraticCurveTo(W*0.34, H*0.065, W*0.36, H*0.045); c.stroke();

  // Books
  const bookCols = ["#8a3018","#18508a","#285820","#684818","#482858"];
  let bx = W*0.38;
  for (let b = 0; b < 5; b++) {
    const bw = W*(0.022+b*0.003);
    c.fillStyle = bookCols[b];
    c.fillRect(bx, H*0.1, bw, H*0.19);
    c.fillStyle = "rgba(255,255,255,0.08)";
    c.fillRect(bx, H*0.1, bw*0.3, H*0.19);
    bx += bw + W*0.004;
  }

  // Lower niche — art piece
  c.fillStyle = "#202028";
  c.fillRect(W*0.32, H*0.32, W*0.36, H*0.12);
  const art = c.createLinearGradient(W*0.32, H*0.32, W*0.68, H*0.44);
  art.addColorStop(0, "#c87840"); art.addColorStop(0.5, "#4060a0"); art.addColorStop(1, "#80c070");
  c.fillStyle = art; c.fillRect(W*0.325, H*0.325, W*0.35, H*0.11);
  // Candle
  c.fillStyle = "#f0ece0";
  c.beginPath(); c.roundRect(W*0.6, H*0.33, W*0.015, H*0.09, 1); c.fill();
  c.fillStyle = "#f0a020";
  c.beginPath(); c.ellipse(W*0.6075, H*0.33, W*0.006, H*0.018, 0, 0, Math.PI*2); c.fill();
  const candleG = c.createRadialGradient(W*0.6075, H*0.33, 0, W*0.6075, H*0.33, W*0.04);
  candleG.addColorStop(0, "rgba(255,200,80,0.3)"); candleG.addColorStop(1, "transparent");
  c.fillStyle = candleG; c.beginPath(); c.arc(W*0.6075, H*0.33, W*0.04, 0, Math.PI*2); c.fill();

  // LED TOP COVE — main feature
  for (let r = 14; r > 0; r--) {
    c.strokeStyle = `rgba(255,215,100,${0.04*r})`;
    c.lineWidth = r * 4;
    c.beginPath(); c.moveTo(W*0.28, H*0.063); c.lineTo(W*0.72, H*0.063); c.stroke();
  }
  c.strokeStyle = "rgba(255,242,180,0.98)"; c.lineWidth = 1.8;
  c.beginPath(); c.moveTo(W*0.28, H*0.063); c.lineTo(W*0.72, H*0.063); c.stroke();

  // Light cast from LED into niche
  const lcG = c.createRadialGradient(W*0.5, H*0.063, 0, W*0.5, H*0.063, H*0.3);
  lcG.addColorStop(0, "rgba(255,220,100,0.2)"); lcG.addColorStop(1, "transparent");
  c.fillStyle = lcG; c.fillRect(W*0.27, H*0.06, W*0.46, H*0.46);

  // BED FRAME
  c.fillStyle = "#282010";
  c.fillRect(W*0.01, H*0.77, W*0.98, H*0.22);
  const bfG = c.createLinearGradient(W*0.01, H*0.77, W*0.99, H*0.77);
  bfG.addColorStop(0,"#201808"); bfG.addColorStop(0.5,"#30281a"); bfG.addColorStop(1,"#181008");
  c.fillStyle = bfG; c.fillRect(W*0.01, H*0.77, W*0.98, H*0.22);

  // Mattress base strip
  const mattG = c.createLinearGradient(0, H*0.75, 0, H*0.79);
  mattG.addColorStop(0, "#f0ece6"); mattG.addColorStop(1, "#e0d8d0");
  c.fillStyle = mattG; c.fillRect(W*0.03, H*0.75, W*0.94, H*0.04);

  // Duvet
  c.fillStyle = "#faf7f4";
  c.beginPath(); c.roundRect(W*0.02, H*0.775, W*0.96, H*0.185, [4,4,0,0]); c.fill();
  // Duvet texture / stitching lines
  c.strokeStyle = "rgba(210,205,198,0.5)"; c.lineWidth = 0.8;
  for (let dl = 0; dl < 6; dl++) {
    c.beginPath(); c.moveTo(W*(0.15+dl*0.135), H*0.775);
    c.lineTo(W*(0.13+dl*0.135), H*0.96); c.stroke();
  }
  c.strokeStyle = "rgba(210,205,198,0.4)"; c.lineWidth = 0.6;
  c.beginPath(); c.moveTo(W*0.02, H*0.85); c.lineTo(W*0.98, H*0.85); c.stroke();

  // LEFT PILLOW
  const p1G = c.createLinearGradient(0, H*0.775, 0, H*0.845);
  p1G.addColorStop(0, "#ffffff"); p1G.addColorStop(1, "#f0ece8");
  c.fillStyle = p1G; c.beginPath(); c.roundRect(W*0.07, H*0.775, W*0.38, H*0.065, 5); c.fill();
  c.fillStyle = "rgba(180,175,168,0.25)"; c.fillRect(W*0.07, H*0.835, W*0.38, H*0.004);
  c.strokeStyle = "rgba(220,216,210,0.5)"; c.lineWidth = 0.7;
  c.strokeRect(W*0.085, H*0.782, W*0.35, H*0.05);

  // RIGHT PILLOW
  c.fillStyle = p1G; c.beginPath(); c.roundRect(W*0.55, H*0.775, W*0.38, H*0.065, 5); c.fill();
  c.fillStyle = "rgba(180,175,168,0.25)"; c.fillRect(W*0.55, H*0.835, W*0.38, H*0.004);
  c.strokeStyle = "rgba(220,216,210,0.5)"; c.lineWidth = 0.7;
  c.strokeRect(W*0.565, H*0.782, W*0.35, H*0.05);

  // Bedside lamp glow (ambient warm)
  const lampG = c.createRadialGradient(W*0.5, H*0.5, 0, W*0.5, H*0.5, H*0.65);
  lampG.addColorStop(0, "rgba(255,195,90,0.08)"); lampG.addColorStop(1, "transparent");
  c.fillStyle = lampG; c.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);

  grain(c, W, H, 0.014); vignette(c, W, H); badge(c, W, H);
  return cv;
}

// ── ESCENA 6: REFORMA INTEGRAL ───────────────
function renderRenovation(W, H) {
  const cv = document.createElement("canvas"); cv.width = W; cv.height = H;
  const c = cv.getContext("2d");

  const bg = c.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, H);
  bg.addColorStop(0, "#ddd8d0"); bg.addColorStop(1, "#c0b8b0");
  c.fillStyle = bg; c.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);

  // Ceiling
  c.fillStyle = "#f2eee8"; c.fillRect(0, 0, W, H*0.1);
  c.fillStyle = "#e8e4dc"; c.fillRect(0, H*0.1, W, H*0.01);

  // LED COVE ceiling
  c.fillStyle = "#2a2520"; c.fillRect(W*0.04, H*0.075, W*0.92, H*0.028);
  for (let r = 10; r > 0; r--) {
    c.strokeStyle = `rgba(255,215,100,${0.05*r})`;
    c.lineWidth = r * 4;
    c.beginPath(); c.moveTo(W*0.07, H*0.088); c.lineTo(W*0.93, H*0.088); c.stroke();
  }
  c.strokeStyle = "rgba(255,238,160,0.95)"; c.lineWidth = 1.5;
  c.beginPath(); c.moveTo(W*0.07, H*0.088); c.lineTo(W*0.93, H*0.088); c.stroke();

  // Ceiling light wash
  const cwash = c.createLinearGradient(0, H*0.088, 0, H*0.4);
  cwash.addColorStop(0, "rgba(255,215,90,0.15)"); cwash.addColorStop(1, "transparent");
  c.fillStyle = cwash; c.fillRect(0, 0, W, H*0.4);

  // BACK WALL — smooth pladur
  c.fillStyle = "#ece8e0"; c.fillRect(W*0.12, H*0.1, W*0.76, H*0.6);
  // Very subtle wall grid
  c.strokeStyle = "rgba(200,195,185,0.15)"; c.lineWidth = 0.4;
  for (let gx = 1; gx < 6; gx++) {
    c.beginPath(); c.moveTo(W*(0.12+gx*0.76/6), H*0.1);
    c.lineTo(W*(0.12+gx*0.76/6), H*0.7); c.stroke();
  }

  // LEFT WALL
  const lwG = c.createLinearGradient(0, 0, W*0.14, 0);
  lwG.addColorStop(0, "#b0a898"); lwG.addColorStop(1, "#d8d0c8");
  c.fillStyle = lwG; c.fillRect(0, 0, W*0.14, H*0.72);

  // RIGHT WALL
  const rwG = c.createLinearGradient(W*0.86, 0, W, 0);
  rwG.addColorStop(0, "#d4ccc4"); rwG.addColorStop(1, "#b8b0a8");
  c.fillStyle = rwG; c.fillRect(W*0.86, 0, W*0.14, H*0.72);

  // LARGE WINDOW
  c.fillStyle = "rgba(140,190,230,0.5)";
  c.fillRect(W*0.56, H*0.14, W*0.27, H*0.4);
  // Window frame
  c.strokeStyle = "#e0d8cc"; c.lineWidth = 5;
  c.strokeRect(W*0.56, H*0.14, W*0.27, H*0.4);
  c.lineWidth = 2;
  c.beginPath(); c.moveTo(W*0.695, H*0.14); c.lineTo(W*0.695, H*0.54); c.stroke();
  c.beginPath(); c.moveTo(W*0.56, H*0.34); c.lineTo(W*0.83, H*0.34); c.stroke();
  // Window light spill
  const wls = c.createLinearGradient(W*0.56, 0, W*0.1, 0);
  wls.addColorStop(0, "rgba(200,225,245,0.28)"); wls.addColorStop(1, "transparent");
  c.fillStyle = wls; c.fillRect(0, H*0.1, W*0.83, H*0.62);

  // Ceiling corner moulding
  c.fillStyle = "rgba(0,0,0,0.08)"; c.fillRect(0, H*0.1, W, H*0.015);

  // FLOOR — light oak herringbone
  const flG = c.createLinearGradient(0, H*0.72, W, H);
  flG.addColorStop(0, "#b8986a"); flG.addColorStop(0.3, "#c8a870");
  flG.addColorStop(0.7, "#d4b87a"); flG.addColorStop(1, "#a88858");
  c.fillStyle = flG; c.fillRect(0, H*0.72, W, H*0.28);

  // Herringbone pattern
  c.save(); c.globalAlpha = 0.1;
  c.strokeStyle = "#5a3818"; c.lineWidth = 0.8;
  for (let hbi = -2; hbi < 16; hbi++) {
    for (let hbj = 0; hbj < 5; hbj++) {
      const hx = hbi*(W/12) + hbj*(W/24);
      const hy = H*0.72 + hbj*(H*0.06);
      c.save(); c.translate(hx, hy); c.rotate(Math.PI/4);
      c.strokeRect(0, 0, W/14, H/12);
      c.restore();
      c.save(); c.translate(hx+W/28, hy); c.rotate(-Math.PI/4);
      c.strokeRect(0, 0, W/14, H/12);
      c.restore();
    }
  }
  c.restore();

  // Skirting board
  c.fillStyle = "#e8e2d8"; c.fillRect(0, H*0.72, W, H*0.016);
  c.fillStyle = "rgba(0,0,0,0.07)"; c.fillRect(0, H*0.72, W, H*0.005);

  // SOFA
  const sofaX = W*0.04, sofaY = H*0.73;
  c.fillStyle = "#7a6858";
  c.beginPath(); c.roundRect(sofaX, sofaY, W*0.5, H*0.14, 4); c.fill();
  c.fillStyle = "#8a7868";
  c.beginPath(); c.roundRect(sofaX, sofaY - H*0.05, W*0.5, H*0.055, [4,4,0,0]); c.fill();
  c.fillStyle = "#7a6858";
  c.fillRect(sofaX, sofaY - H*0.05, W*0.045, H*0.19);
  c.fillRect(sofaX+W*0.455, sofaY - H*0.05, W*0.045, H*0.19);
  // Cushions
  const cCols = ["#9a8878","#8a7868","#a09080"];
  for (let ci = 0; ci < 3; ci++) {
    c.fillStyle = cCols[ci];
    c.beginPath(); c.roundRect(sofaX+W*(0.05+ci*0.145), sofaY+H*0.01, W*0.12, H*0.1, 4); c.fill();
    const csh = c.createLinearGradient(0, sofaY, 0, sofaY+H*0.05);
    csh.addColorStop(0,"rgba(255,255,255,0.07)"); csh.addColorStop(1,"transparent");
    c.fillStyle = csh;
    c.beginPath(); c.roundRect(sofaX+W*(0.05+ci*0.145), sofaY+H*0.01, W*0.12, H*0.05, 4); c.fill();
  }

  // COFFEE TABLE
  c.fillStyle = "#5a4830";
  c.beginPath(); c.roundRect(W*0.18, H*0.845, W*0.22, H*0.04, 3); c.fill();
  const ctTop = c.createLinearGradient(0, H*0.845, 0, H*0.855);
  ctTop.addColorStop(0,"rgba(255,255,255,0.08)"); ctTop.addColorStop(1,"transparent");
  c.fillStyle = ctTop; c.fillRect(W*0.18, H*0.845, W*0.22, H*0.01);
  // Table legs
  c.fillStyle = "#4a3820";
  [[0.19, 0.885],[0.385, 0.885]].forEach(([lx,ly]) => {
    c.fillRect(W*lx, H*ly, W*0.008, H*0.04);
    c.fillRect(W*(lx+0.03), H*ly, W*0.008, H*0.04);
  });
  // Book on table
  c.fillStyle = "#c8401a"; c.fillRect(W*0.22, H*0.836, W*0.08, H*0.01);
  // Mug
  c.fillStyle = "#e8e4dc"; c.beginPath(); c.arc(W*0.35, H*0.84, W*0.015, 0, Math.PI*2); c.fill();

  // BOOKSHELF on left part of back wall
  c.fillStyle = "#302818"; c.fillRect(W*0.14, H*0.14, W*0.26, H*0.5);
  for (let lv = 0; lv < 5; lv++) {
    c.fillStyle = "#201c10"; c.fillRect(W*0.14, H*(0.22+lv*0.08), W*0.26, H*0.01);
    const bkPalette = ["#8a2010","#102a5a","#104520","#502810","#3a1040","#104040"];
    let bkx = W*0.145;
    for (let bk = 0; bk < 6; bk++) {
      const bkw = W*(0.02+Math.random()*0.02);
      const bkh = H*(0.04+Math.random()*0.035);
      c.fillStyle = bkPalette[bk%6];
      c.fillRect(bkx, H*(0.225+lv*0.08)-bkh, bkw, bkh);
      bkx += bkw + W*0.002;
    }
  }

  // FLOOR LAMP (right side)
  c.fillStyle = "#3a3028"; c.fillRect(W*0.82, H*0.76, W*0.006, H*0.16);
  c.fillStyle = "#c8a96e";
  c.beginPath(); c.ellipse(W*0.823, H*0.76, W*0.022, H*0.035, 0, 0, Math.PI*2); c.fill();
  const lampLG = c.createRadialGradient(W*0.823, H*0.76, 0, W*0.823, H*0.76, H*0.3);
  lampLG.addColorStop(0,"rgba(255,200,80,0.28)"); lampLG.addColorStop(0.4,"rgba(255,180,60,0.08)"); lampLG.addColorStop(1,"transparent");
  c.fillStyle = lampLG; c.fillRect(W*0.5, H*0.5, W*0.5, H*0.5);

  grain(c, W, H, 0.013); vignette(c, W, H); badge(c, W, H);
  return cv;
}

// ── DISPATCH & INIT ──────────────────────────
const RENDERS = [
  { fn: renderLEDCeiling,    img: "img-1", loader: "loader-1" },
  { fn: renderPartitionWall, img: "img-2", loader: "loader-2" },
  { fn: renderTVUnit,        img: "img-3", loader: "loader-3" },
  { fn: renderStudio,        img: "img-4", loader: "loader-4" },
  { fn: renderHeadboard,     img: "img-5", loader: "loader-5" },
  { fn: renderRenovation,    img: "img-6", loader: "loader-6" }
];

// Render directly onto canvas elements — zero external requests
const RENDER_MAP = [
  { fn: renderLEDCeiling,    id: "img-1", loader: "loader-1" },
  { fn: renderPartitionWall, id: "img-2", loader: "loader-2" },
  { fn: renderTVUnit,        id: "img-3", loader: "loader-3" },
  { fn: renderStudio,        id: "img-4", loader: "loader-4" },
  { fn: renderHeadboard,     id: "img-5", loader: "loader-5" },
  { fn: renderRenovation,    id: "img-6", loader: "loader-6" },
];

function runRenders() {
  RENDER_MAP.forEach(({ fn, id, loader }, i) => {
    setTimeout(() => {
      try {
        const target = document.getElementById(id);
        const ld = document.getElementById(loader);
        if (!target) return;
        // Render into the existing canvas element directly
        target.width = 800; target.height = 500;
        const tmpCv = fn(800, 500);
        const ctx = target.getContext("2d");
        ctx.drawImage(tmpCv, 0, 0);
        if (ld) ld.style.display = "none";
      } catch(e) {
        const ld = document.getElementById(loader);
        if (ld) ld.style.display = "none";
      }
    }, i * 80);
  });
}

if (document.readyState === "loading") {
  document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", runRenders);
} else {
  runRenders();
}

})();
</script>


<script>
// ── CAROUSEL ──────────────────────────────────
function slideCarousel(carouselId, slidesId, dir) {
  const slides = document.getElementById(slidesId);
  const dotsEl = document.getElementById('dots-' + carouselId.split('-')[1]);
  const total  = slides.children.length;
  let current  = parseInt(slides.dataset.current || 0);
  current = (current + dir + total) % total;
  slides.style.transform = `translateX(-${current * 100}%)`;
  slides.dataset.current = current;
  if (dotsEl) {
    [...dotsEl.children].forEach((d, i) =>
      d.classList.toggle('active', i === current)
    );
  }
}
function goToSlide(slidesId, dotsId, index) {
  const slides = document.getElementById(slidesId);
  slides.style.transform = `translateX(-${index * 100}%)`;
  slides.dataset.current = index;
  const dotsEl = document.getElementById(dotsId);
  if (dotsEl) {
    [...dotsEl.children].forEach((d, i) =>
      d.classList.toggle('active', i === index)
    );
  }
}
// Auto-play carousel every 3.5s
setInterval(() => slideCarousel('carousel-6', 'slides-6', 1), 3500);
</script>


<script>
// ── SWIPE TÁCTIL PARA CARRUSEL EN MÓVIL ──
(function() {
  let touchStartX = 0;
  let touchEndX = 0;

  document.addEventListener('touchstart', function(e) {
    touchStartX = e.changedTouches[0].screenX;
  }, { passive: true });

  document.addEventListener('touchend', function(e) {
    touchEndX = e.changedTouches[0].screenX;
    const diff = touchStartX - touchEndX;
    if (Math.abs(diff) > 50) {
      const carousel = document.getElementById('carousel-6');
      if (carousel && carousel.contains(e.target)) {
        slideCarousel('carousel-6', 'slides-6', diff > 0 ? 1 : -1);
      }
    }
  }, { passive: true });
})();
</script>

// FAQ toggle icon
document.querySelectorAll('details').forEach(d => {
  d.addEventListener('toggle', function() {
    const icon = this.querySelector('summary span');
    if (icon) icon.textContent = this.open ? '−' : '+';
  });
});
</script>
